intro: Poa × nannfeldtii, also known as Nannfeld's meadow-grass, is a hybrid species of grass within the genus Poa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Poa × nannfeldtii include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Poa × nannfeldtii include infusions and decoctions, often used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems.
